content.query:
SELECT sum(Worktime_Seconds)/3600
FROM [dbo].[rtg_session_workhours]
 WHERE 
 move_date='2026-02-14';


SELECT COUNT(*)
 FROM [dbo].[rtg_session_moves]
 WHERE 
 move_date='2026-02-14';

SELECT *, (RTG.Total_Moves/RTG.Total_Work_Hours) as Productivity FROM 
 (SELECT SUM(Total_Moves) as Total_Moves, 
 SUM(Total_Work_Seconds)/3600 as Total_Work_Hours
 from [dbo].[rtg_session_productivity]
 WHERE 
 move_date='2026-02-14') as RTG;

SELECT *
FROM [dbo].[rtg_session_workhours]
 WHERE 
 move_date='2026-02-14';
